CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-21-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Ramiro Castro, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Blanca Alvarez, the Guardian ad Litem for Rosa Palacios.
Ken Jorgensen, Esq. appeared for defendant Louis Gay, Jr., who was not present at today's hearing.
Dismissal of Action by plaintiff Rosa Palacios as to defendant Louis Gay, Jr. was filed on December 12, 2007.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 15, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 21, 2008.

Parties reached a settlement which was read into the record by Mr. Jorgensen. In accordance with the terms of the agreement defendant Louis Gay, Jr. shall pay plaintiff Blanca Alvarez the sum of $3,250.00. Upon payment in full of said amount, plaintiff Blanca Alvarez shall execute a dismissal of the entire action with prejudice. There shall be a release of all claims, and each party shall bear their own fees and costs. Plaintiff is responsible for any and all outstanding medical liens.

Matter is continued to October 21, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.
